name: Perseus Mining Limited
analysis: PRU has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 19% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$5.3000, stop A$4.3857, target A$6.2563 (1.05:1) — then trail it.
